meta.name: Magneta — Polygon Gateway setEidCctpDomainBatch (LZ EIDs → Circle CCTP domains)
meta.description: Map LayerZero EIDs to Circle CCTP domains on the Polygon Gateway so depositForBurn routes USDC to the correct destination chain (otherwise unset entries default to 0 = Ethereum). Covers the 6 CCTP destinations from the BETA list (self excluded): ethereum=0, arbitrum=3, base=6, optimism=2, avalanche=1, linea=11.
